summary: Iteration 25 - 'Ma Prime Carbone' farmer-facing calculator. ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: POST /api/carbon-payments/ma-prime returns correct premium calculations and does NOT include distribution details. Frontend: Shows 'Comment ça marche' with 5 steps, 8-question calculator form, result displays prime_par_kg, prime_annuelle, CO2, and personalized conseil. No distribution breakdown visible to farmer.
critical_code_review_comments: carbon_payments_dashboard.py: /ma-prime endpoint correctly returns only farmer-facing fields (prime_par_kg_fcfa, prime_annuelle_fcfa, tonnes_co2_an, conseil)
carbon_payments_dashboard.py: MaPrimeRequest model has all 8 required fields with proper validation
carbon_payments_dashboard.py: _generer_conseil() provides personalized advice based on practices
CarbonPaymentsDashboard.jsx: Correctly shows 5-step 'Comment ça marche' section
CarbonPaymentsDashboard.jsx: All 8 question inputs have proper data-testid attributes
CarbonPaymentsDashboard.jsx: data-testid='distribution-model' REMOVED (correct - farmer should not see distribution)
CarbonPaymentsDashboard.jsx: Result prominently displays prime_par_kg, prime_annuelle, CO2, and conseil
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - /ma-prime is a public calculator endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ma Prime Carbone feature fully verified. The /api/carbon-payments/ma-prime endpoint is PUBLIC (no auth required) and returns ONLY farmer-facing fields. The /api/carbon-payments/dashboard endpoint requires auth and returns more details including distribution_model (for internal use, but frontend no longer displays it). Key carbon constants: FEES_RATE=0.30, FARMER_SHARE_RATE=0.70, GREENLINK_MARGIN_RATE=0.25, COOPERATIVE_SHARE_RATE=0.05. Yields: cacao=600, cafe=400, anacarde=500 kg/ha. Default price from carbon_config collection.

features_verified.POST /api/carbon-payments/ma-prime (good: PASS - 48 arbres/ha, no chemicals, no burning → high premium (106 FCFA/kg, 191100 FCFA/year, 19.5t CO2)
features_verified.POST /api/carbon-payments/ma-prime (poor: PASS - 15 arbres/ha, chemicals, burning → low premium (lower values as expected)
features_verified.POST /api/carbon-payments/ma-prime respo: PASS - Returns prime_par_kg_fcfa, prime_annuelle_fcfa, tonnes_co2_an, conseil
features_verified.POST /api/carbon-payments/ma-prime NO di: PASS - Response does NOT include distribution_model, fees, greenlink_share, coop_share
features_verified.Frontend: 'Comment ça marche' 5 steps: PASS - All 5 steps displayed with correct text
features_verified.Frontend: 'Estimer ma prime' button: PASS - Button found and opens 8-question form
features_verified.Frontend: 8-question form inputs: PASS - All 8 inputs present: hectares, arbres, culture, engrais, brulage, residus, couverture, especes
features_verified.Frontend: NO distribution breakdown: PASS - data-testid='distribution-model' NOT present, no fees/shares visible
features_verified.Frontend: 'Demander un versement' button: PASS - Button present with Orange Money text

output.conseil: Excellent ! Vos pratiques sont déjà très bonnes. Maintenez-les pour une prime optimale.

mocked_api_note: Orange Money payment remains MOCKED as per original design
